mapper.select: SELECT n.notification_id, n.message, n.type, n.created_at, nu.viewed FROM notification n JOIN notification_user nu using (notification_id) WHERE nu.workshop_id = #{workshopId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification_user (notification_id, user_id, workshop_id) VALUES (#{notificationId}, #{userId}, #{workshopId})
